name: react-native-starter
description: Production-ready React Native starter — TypeScript (strict), feature-first architecture, theme tokens, i18n (EN/DE/RU), offline-first, pluggable transport, Biome, Jest, GitHub Actions.
author: Maxim Livshitz

scripts.android: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && node scripts/wait-for-android-device.cjs && react-native run-android
scripts.npx:android: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && node scripts/wait-for-android-device.cjs && npx react-native run-android
scripts.adb: adb reverse tcp:9090 tcp:9090 && adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000 && adb reverse tcp:9001 tcp:9001 && adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081
scripts.android:assets: mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/ && react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res/
scripts.android:build:bundle: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.android:build:debug: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && open android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/
scripts.android:build:release: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && open android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/
scripts.android:clean: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && rm -rf android/app/.cxx android/app/build android/build
scripts.android:clean:gradle: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && cd android && ./gradlew clean -x :app:externalNativeBuildCleanDebug -x :app:externalNativeBuildCleanDebugOptimized -x :app:externalNativeBuildCleanRelease && cd ..
scripts.gradle:debug: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ..
scripts.gradle:clean: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && rm -rf android/app/.cxx android/app/build android/build
scripts.i18n:all: npm run i18n:extract && npm run i18n:types
scripts.android:rebuild: node scripts/ensure-env.cjs && rm -rf android/app/build android/app/.cxx android/build android/.gradle && cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug && cd .. && node scripts/wait-for-android-device.cjs && npx react-native run-android
